name: Kishou Arima - Route V14
description:
Spoilers for Tokyo Ghoul.

"It was not anything like flowers, but a large amount of..."

Death.


A little bot i made becuse i was reading Tokyo Ghoul. It mostly works if you are a Ghoul, if not- uhhh... idk.

Because i didn't explain myself, the bot is about the Owl Supression Operation, but just the part of Kishou in the Route V14. Where he killed a lot of ghouls and Kaneki, in this bot you take the place of Kaneki. A simple Battle-Roleplay

For any suggestion, ask me in the comments - And, before anything, sorry my lack of experience, this is the first -kinda serious- bot i made.
creator: Mr.Crabs
